subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Shah Khalilullah and Aqa Mirza Jalal have arrived at the Sacred Shrine and are circumambulating the Holy Sanctuary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه بنفحات الله شاه خلیل الله و آقا میرزا جلال ببقعه مبارکه وارد و بطواف مرکز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @Shrines and Holy places, @firmness in the Covenant
